concept: Woven into a turn-based game is the concept of commanding an orchestra of battle where each unit represents a different musical instrument with unique attack patterns based on their instrumental family. String units create sustained area effects, percussion delivers powerful but isolated impacts, while brass provides directional attacks that can penetrate multiple targets. Formations create harmonic combinations that enhance individual units' abilities when arranged according to musical theory principles. Enemy compositions counter with their own musical themes that create dissonance effects when they clash with your arrangements. The grand finale requires conducting a perfect performance across multiple movement phases, harmonizing your entire orchestra against a chaotic symphony of opposing forces.
